So how different is e0 and e3
So the way to get giant damage numbers with ghelot is
you use crimson shackles to get a 4 cost flail
then retain it in hand and copy it 1 million times
and spam like 8 flails in one turn
E3 makes this strategy very consistent because you always start with shackles in hand
and flail has prepare 2 so you can setup very fast
e0 this strategy takes like 4 turns to pull off minimum
Holy
I love prepare
and if u dont draw shackles its even longer
Hmm ok
so its harder to pull big numbers
and meanwhile you are getting smacked by enemies and so on

thats why e3 is so important
i mean u can run dreams covenant and then have 2
